
Seed: 2 | first-ready turn: 2
===== SIMULATE THIS =====
Scenario: strict-jit-turn2-item-lock/go-second | DCI: strict-JIT | Locks: turn-two Item lock
Mulligans: 0
Opening player-known state: Active=Regidrago V [-] | Bench=Regidrago V [-] | Hand=Mysterious Treasure, Powerglass, Regidrago V, Guzma, Tapu Lele-GX | Discard=(none)
DEBUG ONLY: prizes=Arven, Fire Energy, Earthen Vessel, Gladion, Gladion, Hisuian Goodra VSTAR. Policy may use them only after a legal deck or Prize inspection.
Policy rule: strict and matchup-flex JIT require a payload to enter discard in the same player turn as the ready-state check.
T1 | DRAW | rules: R-GAME-DRAW | start-of-turn: Professor Turo's Scenario
T1 | POLICY | rules: P-AXIS-01 | Start: Active=Regidrago V [-] | Bench=Regidrago V [-] | Hand=Mysterious Treasure, Powerglass, Regidrago V, Guzma, Tapu Lele-GX, Professor Turo's Scenario | Discard=(none)
T1 | BENCH | rules: R-GAME-BENCH | Tapu Lele-GX from hand.
T1 | DECK KNOWLEDGE | rules: P-KNOWLEDGE-01 | Wonder Tag: deck inspected; Prize identities are now deducible for later decisions.
T1 | WONDER TAG | rules: R-TAPU-01 | Searched and revealed Crispin.
T1 | DISCARD | rules: R-MT-01 | Regidrago V (Mysterious Treasure cost)
T1 | PLAY ITEM | rules: R-MT-01; R-GAME-ITEM | Searched a Psychic or Dragon Pokémon: Regidrago VSTAR.
T1 | PLAY SUPPORTER | rules: R-CRISPIN-01; R-GAME-SUPPORTER | Searched Grass Energy and Fire Energy; attached Grass Energy to Regidrago V and put Fire Energy into hand.
T1 | ATTACH | rules: R-GAME-ENERGY | Fire Energy manually to Regidrago V.
T1 | ATTACK | rules: R-RV-01; R-GAME-ATTACK | Regidrago V used Celestial Roar; processed top 3: Field Blower, Regidrago VSTAR, Mysterious Treasure; attached Energy: (none); remaining discarded: Field Blower, Regidrago VSTAR, Mysterious Treasure.

T2 | DRAW | rules: R-GAME-DRAW | start-of-turn: Brilliant Blender

T2 | EVOLVE | rules: R-GAME-EVOLVE | Evolved Regidrago V into Regidrago VSTAR.
T2 | LEGACY STAR | rules: R-RVS-01; R-VSTAR-01 | Discarded top 7: Chaotic Swell, Mysterious Treasure, Tapu Lele-GX, Hisuian Heavy Ball, Mega Dragonite ex, Dipplin TWM 127, Dialga-GX; recovered: Crispin.
T2 | PLAY SUPPORTER | rules: R-CRISPIN-01; R-GAME-SUPPORTER | Searched Grass Energy and Fire Energy; attached Grass Energy to Regidrago VSTAR and put Fire Energy into hand.

T2 | READY | rules: R-RVS-01; P-JIT-01 | Active Regidrago VSTAR has GGF and a permitted Dragon payload in discard.
